audit_items.proof_trace: The function neither allocates nor frees any pointers — `dev` and `rst` are incoming parameters only. `reset_control_deassert(rst)` asserts hardware state without freeing `rst`, and `devm_add_action_or_reset` registers `rst` as cleanup data rather than consuming it. Devres LIFO ordering guarantees the registered callback (`aspeed_peci_reset_control_release`, which calls `reset_control_assert(rst)`) fires before the earlier `devm_reset_control_get` entry releases `rst`, so no use-after-free is possible at teardown.
